content.rendered:
ProPak China 2024 The 29th International Processing and Packaging Exhibition

Date: 19-21 June, 2024
Venue: National Exhibition and Convention Center (Shanghai)
Address: No. 1888 ZhuGuang Road, QingPu District, Shanghai, China
Our Booth No.: 61A05

Welcome to Visit our booth, Contact for picking up from air port , or train station, Vis what’sapp/wechat 0086-18116425561

ProPak China 2024, the 29th International Processing & Packaging Exhibition, will be held at the National Exhibition and Convention Center in Shanghai from 19 to 21 June 2024. As the premier processing and packaging event in China, ProPak China offers cutting-edge solutions for the food, beverage, dairy, pharmaceutical, cosmetic, and other industries. This event is the perfect venue to explore the latest advancements in machines, systems, technologies, and applications.

Co-located with FoodPack China, Hi & Fi Asia-China, HNC, and Starch, ProPak China provides a comprehensive platform for end-users in the food, health ingredients, processing, packaging, and natural and nutraceutical product industries. With a wide range of exhibits, an international business platform, and an extensive supporting program, ProPak China is where the entire industry converges.

What machine Npack will exhibit?

We are excited to announce that Shanghai Npack will be exhibiting a smart food sauce bottling equipments at ProPak China 2024. Our equipments and machines will include as below:

  • Sauce Filling Machine: An automatic tracking pump filling machine for visoucs liquid, such as sauce, paste and jam.this machine ensures accurate filling of various sauce types, maintaining product integrity and reducing waste of liquid. Reaching speed 50b/m for a glass jar with 300g sauce.
  • Bottle Capping Machine: Our model NP-TC automatic tracking capping machine,it is a bottle or jar capping machine with a automatic cap elevator to feed caps and lid,capacity 40b/m for single capping heads
  • Labeling Machine: Featuring advanced servo technology, Npack labeling machines provides consistent and accurate label placement, enhancing product presentation and brand recognition.It is one type of sticker labeling machine
  • Printer: The printer is for print date,batch number or codes one surface of the labels, also on the containers surface.
  • Cartoning Machine: Our cartoning machine efficiently fill bottles into cartons, and automatic sealing the carton
  • Palletizer: The palletizer system we offer is designed for optimal stacking and pallet formation, improving logistics efficiency and ensuring safe handling and storage.

These complete set of bottling equipments demonstrates our commitment to providing integrated solutions that enhance production efficiency, product quality, and operational flexibility. Visit our exhibit to see these machines in action and you will find how they can benefit your production line and save your packaging cost.
